title: (Bearish Signal) MGNX, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned negative
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bearish indicator signaling MGNX's price could decline from here. Traders may explore shorting the stock or put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 58 similar cases where MGNX's MACD histogram became negative, and 48 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $31.42 is above $28.48 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/26/21 - 03/30/21, the price experienced a +24% Uptrend. During the week of 03/23/21 - 03/30/21, the stock enjoyed a +0.65% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/443rbupjydq61.png?width=1530&format=png&auto=webp&s=ff826ce05ee7f968983764c176c768417fda7ef8

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for MGNX moved out of overbought territory on March 23, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 26 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 23 of the 26 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 88%.

The Stochastic Indicator has been in the overbought zone for 2 days. Expect a price pull-back in the near future.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for MGNX turned negative on March 30, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 58 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 48 of the 58 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 83%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where MGNX declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 85%.

MGNX broke above its upper Bollinger Band on February 26, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10296177-macrogenics-s-mgnx-31-1-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-negative?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
